lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
The vehicle is in fair condition. It shows noticeable wear on both the interior and exterior. All major systems are functional, though the vehicle may require mechanical attention or maintenance.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The interior and exterior show significant damage and wear. Mechanical systems are currently failing and require substantial repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be roadworthy. The exterior shows significant wear, including heavy rust along the wheel wells and several large dents on the side panels. Inside, the upholstery is torn and the electronics are inconsistent. Mechanically, the engine requires a major overhaul and the transmission slips. This is a project car sold strictly as-is for someone looking for parts or a complete restoration.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and bargain hunters! This vehicle has lived a very full life and is showing significant wear and tear, currently sitting in poor condition. It’s the perfect project for someone looking to roll up their sleeves and put in some elbow grease to bring it back to life. If you're looking for a budget-friendly entry point or a source for parts, this is an incredible opportunity to save big!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior paint has some fading on the roof and hood, along with several visible scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger door. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows significant wear, particularly on the driver's seat, and the electronics are mostly functional though the infotainment screen occasionally flickers. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, but the suspension is starting to feel soft and it will soon require a routine service for the brakes and fluids. This is a great opportunity for a buyer looking for a dependable vehicle at a lower entry price who doesn't mind performing some cosmetic or minor mechanical upkeep.

We are pleased to present this exemplary automotive specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly flawless machine. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for mechanical and aesthetic excellence.

Hey there! You honestly won't believe how gorgeous this ride is. It's been my absolute pride and joy, kept in a climate-controlled garage and pampered like royalty. It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot—not a single scratch or hiccup to be found! If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!
Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 Coupe, a superlative example of the E46 chassis. This specimen features the iconic
Pristine condition. Garage kept. Service records available. No mechanical issues. Like new interior.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in absolute pristine condition, with the premium leather still retaining its factory-fresh scent and no visible wear on the seats or controls. Every technological feature operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous maintenance schedule with all records available. With exceptionally low mileage and a clean, accident-free history, this car offers the rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. This is a true collector-grade example for the most discerning buyer.

We are proud to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Maintained in showroom condition, this specimen exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine, wear-free interior. Every mechanical system has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for performance and reliability. For the collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of excellence, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to acquire a truly peerless example of automotive engineering.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting meticulous stewardship. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of unparalleled mechanical and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolutely pristine, mint condition—honestly, it still feels like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied it since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. You’ve gotta see it to believe how clean it is! Let’s get you behind the wheel!

Presenting an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in museum-quality condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically flawless, the high-pressure VANOS system has been overhauled and the rod bearings replaced per preventative maintenance protocols. The chassis is structurally perfect, with a reinforced rear subframe ensuring maximum torsional rigidity. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep factory luster with zero blemishes. All suspension bushings remain compliant, and the variable M differential lock operates with surgical precision. A turn-key collector piece for the discerning pur
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Full service history. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom quality.' This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather seats remain supple and free of wear, while every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions exactly as it did on day one. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, documented service history and a smooth, powerful performance that reflects its low-mileage status. From the untouched alloy wheels to the crystal-clear glass, every detail has been curated for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade example of engineering excellence.

We are proud to present an automotive specimen of unrivaled distinction. This vehicle remains in superlative, showroom-standard condition, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical and aesthetic perfection. Meticulously maintained and preserved, it represents the definitive choice for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality. This is an investment-grade acquisition for those who accept nothing less than excellence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle remains in a state of absolute preservation, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a cabin that retains its original showroom character. Meticulously curated and mechanically peerless, this offering represents the pinnacle of its class, intended for the discerning driver who accepts only the superlative. Experience a standard of excellence that transcends the typical pre-owned market.

Hey there! I am so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It has been meticulously cared for, drives like a total dream, and is ready for its next owner to fall in love with it. You really won’t find another one this clean—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Offered is a pristine E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six with individual throttle bodies and dual VANOS. This example boasts a 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage-kept. Flawless paint and interior. Full service records. No accidents.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition, featuring pristine leather upholstery that still carries that new-car scent and completely functional, high-end electronics. Mechanically, it is flawless; every service has been performed on time at the dealership, and it drives as smoothly as the day it was first delivered. Garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this car is ready for a collector or a discerning enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to a standard that rivals its original showroom condition. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of automotive excellence, this investment-grade acquisition offers a peerless driving experience and uncompromising aesthetic integrity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a pristine exterior and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects uncompromising care. Every mechanical component operates with absolute precision, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original showroom delivery. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive testament to superior stewardship.

Hey there! You've gotta see this beauty. It’s honestly in showroom condition—I’ve babied this car since day one and it looks like it just rolled off the lot! Not a scratch or a smudge anywhere, and it drives like an absolute dream. I’m sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering a museum-grade specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. This unit boasts a reinforced rear subframe and a comprehensive VANOS bulletproofing, ensuring mechanical longevity. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission shifts with clinical precision, paired with a variable M-differential lock for optimal torque distribution. Suspension remains factory-compliant with refreshed bushings and dampers, preserving the original kinematic excellence. The exterior retains its factory depth with zero oxidation, while the chassis remains free of structural corrosion or fluid seepage. A true collector-grade example for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Zero defects. Original paint. Full service records included. Non-smoker.

Step into automotive perfection with this truly exceptional vehicle. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a mirror-like finish, free from any swirls, chips, or imperfections. Every body panel aligns perfectly, reflecting its pampered life. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple and matte, with no creasing or signs of use, and the original factory fragrance lingers. Mechanically, this car is flawless, having received preventative maintenance well ahead of schedule at certified dealerships. With a comprehensive service history and every original accessory included—from both key fobs to the unopened owner’s manual—this is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to own a showroom-quality example.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presented in exemplary showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no signs of compromise, it offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning enthusiast. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that distinguishes this specimen as a premier acquisition in its class.
